source_limitations: TikTok suggested-account lists are mutable recommendation output.
This observation does not prove follower/following relationship, endorsement, country/region, cross-platform identity, or metric validity.
Candidate accounts were not opened/captured in this pass.
No screenshot bytes are emitted in chat or stored in this graph artifact.

operational_decision.next_scan_rule: Deduplicate exact handles, capture parent platform profile/grid packet when entering each candidate, then inspect source-visible link hub or profile links for sibling IG/YT only after owner-authorized platform access.
